title: scopolia lurida
intro: Scopolia lurida, also known as American or green flowering devil's trumpet, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its greenish-yellow flowers. The plant's roots, leaves, and seeds contain tropane alkaloids, which have been used for their medicinal properties, including antispasmodic and anticholinergic effects. The medicinal properties of Scopolia lurida have been used to treat various health conditions, such as muscle spasms, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as to reduce respiratory secretions and dilate pupils. In herbal preparations, Scopolia lurida is often combined with other plants, such as lobelia and valerian, to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
